name: has_tools-false-matches-absent
note: An authored {has_tools: false} matches by equality when the request has no tools.

messages.content: a plain prompt with no tools

name: has_tools-false-no-match-when-present
note: When tools are present has_tools=true, so {has_tools: false} is false (equality, not catch-all) and it falls through to default.
